title: Importing Formulas not results
excerpt: It would be really useful to be able to export the formulas of a column instead of the results, so we can use the same formulas in different accounts.

posts.author: mrln01 (Yanes)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be really useful to be able to export the formulas of a column instead of the results, so we can use the same formulas in different accounts.
